'''Lannik''' was the native spoken and written [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] species from [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. Most Lanniks were fluent in both Lannik and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
